ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment ended */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., active, completed, suspended) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the experiment */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the experiment */,
  "project_code" TEXT /* Unique code or identifier for the project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment is being conducted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the experiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the session belongs to */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator conducting the session */,
  "session_status" TEXT /* Status of the session (e.g., in-progress, completed, aborted) */,
  "session_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations made during the session */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the session */,
  "session_cost" REAL /* Cost incurred during the session */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sessions_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the measurement belongs to */,
  "iteration_number" INTEGER /* Number of the iteration */,
  "seconds" INTEGER /* Number of seconds into the session */,
  "F3_value" REAL /* Value of F3 measurement */,
  "C4_value" REAL /* Value of C4 measurement */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., temperature, pressure, humidity) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations related to the measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the measurement was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., lab technician, researcher) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the operator belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the operator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the operator account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the operator account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, Excel) */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the file was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access event was logged */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experimental_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "param_source" TEXT /* Source of the parameter value (e.g., manual input, sensor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experimental_parameters_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "session_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the parameter belongs to */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "param_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "param_description" TEXT /* Description of the parameter */,
  "param_source" TEXT /* Source of the parameter value (e.g., manual input, sensor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the parameter was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_session_parameters_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)
